name: Backyard Patio Lounger
description: Harsh sunlight outdoor portrait on patio chair with emphasis on anatomical fidelity and natural skin texture
input_prompt: woman in black bikini relaxing on patio lounger in backyard

subject.description: Young woman with tanned sun-kissed complexion, long wavy dirty blonde hair with highlights and darker roots, fit toned physique relaxing on a backyard patio lounger.

body.physique: Fit and toned with a defined waistline and athletic proportions.
body.anatomy: Seated on the lounger with relaxed shoulders and natural torso posture, legs extended with one knee bent, muscle definition visible.
body.details: Visible pores, slight imperfections, natural oil sheen from sunscreen, micro shadowing, no smoothing.

subject.face: Oval face with full lips and straight nose, neutral to slightly serious expression, direct gaze, natural glowing makeup.
subject.hair: Long wavy dirty blonde hair with lighter highlights and darker roots, parted in the middle and falling over shoulders naturally.
subject.skin: Tanned sun-kissed tone with realistic pores, slight imperfections, and high-specular sunscreen sheen.

wardrobe.top: Black textured crinkle fabric triangle bikini top with gold O-ring center and thin straps with gold ring hardware at the shoulders.
wardrobe.bottom: Matching black textured crinkle fabric bikini bottoms with standard cut and gold O-rings at the hips.

pose_action.description: Seated on a mesh lounge chair, body angled slightly with head facing forward, arm-length framing from slightly above eye level.
pose_action.posture: Torso leaning back, left arm extended behind gripping the chair edge, right leg extended, left leg bent at the knee.

scene.environment: Outdoor residential patio with grey interlocking paver stone flooring.
scene.background: White vinyl privacy fence with green leafy bushes between the chair and fence.
props: Grey mesh sun lounger with dark metal frame and mesh seating.

lighting.type: direct hard natural sunlight from upper right
lighting.shadows: Distinct shadows fall to the left.

camera.technical: Professional DSLR, 50-85mm portrait lens, f/4, 8k resolution, sharp subject focus with slightly soft background, centered composition, raw output.
camera.negative_constraints: No anatomy normalization, no body proportion averaging, no skin smoothing, no plastic skin, no airbrushed texture, no beautification filters, no stylized realism, no studio lighting, no editorial fashion proportions, no mirror selfie, no phone in hand.

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A hyper-realistic photograph of a young woman in her early 20s relaxing on a grey mesh sun lounger in her backyard patio. She has a tanned sun-kissed complexion with a fit and toned physique featuring a defined waistline. Her long wavy dirty blonde hair has lighter highlights and darker roots, parted in the middle and falling naturally over her shoulders. She has an oval face with full lips and a straight nose, with a neutral to slightly serious expression and direct gaze at the viewer. She wears a black textured crinkle fabric triangle bikini top with a gold O-ring center and thin straps with gold ring hardware at the shoulders, paired with matching black crinkle fabric bikini bottoms with gold O-rings at the hips. She accessorizes with a thin gold chain necklace and silver belly button piercing. She is seated with her torso leaning back, left arm extended behind gripping the chair edge, right leg extended and left leg bent at the knee. The setting features a grey interlocking paver stone patio floor, white vinyl privacy fence, and green leafy bushes. Direct hard natural sunlight from the upper right creates high contrast with sharp shadows to the left and strong specular highlights on her skin emphasizing muscle definition. Her skin shows natural visible pores and a high-specular shiny finish from sunscreen. Shot on 50-85mm portrait lens at f/4. No skin smoothing. No airbrushing. No beautification filters.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A hyper-realistic photograph of a young woman in her early 20s relaxing on a grey mesh sun lounger on a residential patio. She has a tanned sun-kissed complexion with a fit toned physique and defined waistline. Her long wavy dirty blonde hair has lighter highlights and darker roots. She has a neutral to slightly serious expression with direct gaze at the viewer. She wears a black crinkle fabric triangle bikini with gold O-ring center and gold hardware, a thin gold chain necklace, and silver belly piercing. She is seated leaning back with her left arm gripping the chair edge. The backyard features grey paver stones, a white vinyl privacy fence, and green bushes. Direct hard sunlight from the upper right creates high contrast with sharp shadows and specular highlights. Natural skin texture with visible pores and shiny oil sheen from sunscreen.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the bikini from black to bright coral orange while keeping the same crinkle fabric texture and gold O-ring hardware details. Preserve the pose, lighting, background, and natural skin texture.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed bikini with material, hardware, fit descriptions
2_realism_anchors: 'visible pores', 'oil sheen from sunscreen', 'high specular finish'
4_negative_hygiene: extensive list preventing beautification and normalization
5_spatial_consistency: precise pose description with arm/leg positions
7_anatomical_fidelity: emphasis on preserving natural body proportions
